error_signature: Cannot connect Messenger to n8n webhook
title: Messenger webhook not connecting to n8n
symptom: The user is unable to connect Messenger to n8n, receiving no data despite using ngrok.
applies_when: ngrok is set up and running
not_this_if: Webhook URL in Messenger matches n8n's expected endpoint
root_cause: The issue arises when the webhook URL configured in Messenger does not match the endpoint that n8n is listening to. In this case, the user is using '/webhook/' in Messenger while testing with '/webhook-test/' in n8n, leading to a mismatch.
fix_steps: Ensure the webhook URL in Messenger matches the n8n endpoint exactly.
If n8n is set to listen on '/webhook-test/', update Messenger to use this URL.
agent_instruction: Update the Messenger webhook URL to match the n8n endpoint being tested.
